file: 1093_Kimura 等 - 2024 - Controlling Catalytic Activities for Hydroisomerization and Hydrocracking of Long-chain Alkanes Usin.txt

experiments.reaction_type: 加氢异构化和加氢裂化反应
experiments.description: 在固定床流动反应器中，使用Pt-MgO负载的MFI、Beta和FAU沸石催化剂，在250°C、常压、H2/反应物摩尔比为13的条件下，对正十二烷（n-C12）进行催化加氢异构化和加氢裂化反应，以生产碳数为7-9的异构烷烃（i-C7-9）。实验考察了催化剂接触时间（W/F）从0.05到1.4 g-cat. h/g-reactant的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: Hydroisomerization and hydrocracking of n-paraffin were carried out at ambient pressure in a fixed bed flow reactor... The reactant (n-C12) was fed to a 150 °C preheater by a microsyringe pump at the flow rate required to achieve the selected contact time (W/F)... The reaction was performed at 250 °C for 1 h

Catalyst composition.value: Pt and MgO supported on MFI, Beta, and FAU zeolites
Catalyst composition.original: Pt and MgO supported on MFI, Beta, and FAU zeolites

Product yield.original: i-C7-9 yield reached 42 C mol% over MgO/Pt/Beta at W/F=0.6 h
